subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God and the God of all who dwell in the realms of dominion and heaven! Thou beholdest me turning toward the gate of the City of Thy bounty, which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا الهی و اله من فی الملک و الملکوت ترانی متوجها الی باب مدینه فضلک الذی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
